item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we often prioritize communal welfare and social stability, which can sometimes mean limiting individual freedoms for the greater good.

notes: Agent A opens by disagreeing with society-over-individual priority, then shifts at turn 3 and turn 5 toward a culturally grounded collective-welfare position while still preserving individual-rights caveats. Agent B stays rights-first and becomes firmer by the end. Agent A turn 3 includes a non-English script artifact: "individual and集体 needs".
